Example_EN: She initially refused, but later changed her mind.
Example_CN: 她起初拒绝，后来改变了主意。

Example_EN: Good employees take the initiative without being asked.
Example_CN: 好员工会主动做事，无需催促。

Example_EN: Be careful not to injure yourself on the icy path.
Example_CN: 结冰小路上小心别弄伤自己。

Example_EN: The injured player left the pitch with help.
Example_CN: 受伤球员在帮助下离开球场。

Collocation: serious injury;risk of injury;recover from injury
Example_EN: He needs rest after a serious knee injury.
Example_CN: 严重膝伤后他需要休息。

Example_EN: She tries to keep her inner peace during exams.
Example_CN: 考试时她努力保持内心平静。

Example_EN: The court found him innocent of all charges.
Example_CN: 法院认定他所有指控均无罪。

Example_EN: Technological innovation changes how people travel.
Example_CN: 技术创新改变人们出行方式。

Example_EN: The company is famous for innovative phone designs.
Example_CN: 该公司以创新手机设计闻名。

Example_EN: We welcome input from parents on school meals.
Example_CN: 我们欢迎家长对学校膳食提供意见。

Example_EN: Please make an inquiry at the information desk.
Example_CN: 请到服务台询问。
MemoryTip: inquiry：询问或调查（美式拼写常见）。

Example_EN: A flying insect landed on the picnic blanket.
Example_CN: 一只飞虫落在野餐毯上。

Collocation: insert a coin;insert into;insert a key
Example_EN: Please insert your card into the payment machine.
Example_CN: 请把卡插入支付机。

Example_EN: Travel can give valuable insight into other cultures.
Example_CN: 旅行能让人深入了解其他文化。

Example_EN: Parents insist on regular bedtime for young children.
Example_CN: 父母坚持让小孩子按时睡觉。

Example_EN: Engineers inspect the bridge carefully every year.
Example_CN: 工程师每年仔细检查这座桥。

Example_EN: The kitchen must pass a safety inspection next week.
Example_CN: 厨房下周必须通过安全检查。

Example_EN: A school inspector visited lessons on Tuesday.
Example_CN: 督学周二听了课。

Example_EN: Nature is a powerful source of inspiration for artists.
Example_CN: 自然是艺术家强大的灵感来源。

Example_EN: Good teachers inspire students to keep learning.
Example_CN: 好老师激励学生持续学习。

Example_EN: Please install the new software before the lesson.
Example_CN: 上课前请安装新软件。

Example_EN: The art installation filled the whole gallery floor.
Example_CN: 这座艺术装置铺满整个画廊地面。

Example_EN: Some birds, for instance owls, hunt at night.
Example_CN: 有些鸟，例如猫头鹰，夜间捕食。

Example_EN: She received an instant reply to her email.
Example_CN: 她立刻收到了邮件回复。

Example_EN: She works at a research institute near Oxford.
Example_CN: 她在牛津附近一家研究院工作。

Example_EN: Universities are important public institutions.
Example_CN: 大学是重要的公共机构。

Example_EN: Please follow the instructions on the packet carefully.
Example_CN: 请仔细按照包装上的说明操作。

Example_EN: My driving instructor was patient and clear.
Example_CN: 我的驾驶教练耐心又清楚。

Example_EN: She began to play a musical instrument at age six.
Example_CN: 她六岁开始学一种乐器。

Example_EN: There was insufficient evidence to close the case.
Example_CN: 结案证据不足。

Collocation: insult someone;add insult to injury;personal insult
Example_EN: Do not insult classmates even as a joke.
Example_CN: 即使开玩笑也不要侮辱同学。

Example_EN: Always buy travel insurance before a long trip.
Example_CN: 长途旅行前一定要买旅行保险。

Example_EN: Chess offers a real intellectual challenge.
Example_CN: 国际象棋带来真正的智力挑战。

Example_EN: Artificial intelligence is changing office work.
Example_CN: 人工智能正在改变办公室工作。

Example_EN: She is an intelligent student with clear questions.
Example_CN: 她是提问清晰的聪明学生。

Example_EN: I intend to finish this chapter before dinner.
Example_CN: 我打算晚饭前写完这一章。

Example_EN: Athletes train in intense heat during summer camps.
Example_CN: 运动员在夏令营的酷热中训练。

Example_EN: The intensity of the sunlight hurt our eyes.
Example_CN: 阳光强度刺痛我们的眼睛。

Example_EN: She had no intention of hurting anyone's feelings.
Example_CN: 她无意伤害任何人的感情。

Example_EN: Children learn faster when they interact with classmates.
Example_CN: 孩子们与同学互动时学得更快。

Example_EN: Online games still need real social interaction.
Example_CN: 网络游戏仍需要真实社交互动。

Example_EN: Please do not share internal emails outside the company.
Example_CN: 请勿把内部邮件分享到公司外。

Example_EN: She booked an international flight for next Monday.
Example_CN: 她订了下周一的国际航班。

Example_EN: Students must interpret the poem in their own words.
Example_CN: 学生必须用自己的话解读这首诗。

Example_EN: There is more than one interpretation of this painting.
Example_CN: 这幅画可有多种解读。

Collocation: interrupt a meeting;sorry to interrupt;interrupt someone
Example_EN: Please do not interrupt when someone else is speaking.
Example_CN: 别人说话时请不要打断。

Example_EN: There will be a short interval after the first half.
Example_CN: 上半场结束后将有短暂休息时间。

Example_EN: She has a job interview at nine o'clock tomorrow.
Example_CN: 她明天九点有一场求职面试。

Example_EN: The book starts with a brief introduction to the topic.
Example_CN: 这本书以对该主题的简短介绍开始。

Example_EN: Please do not invade other people's privacy online.
Example_CN: 请不要侵犯他人的网络隐私。

Example_EN: Cameras at the door felt like an invasion of privacy.
Example_CN: 门口的摄像头感觉像侵犯隐私。

Example_EN: The smartphone is a useful modern invention.
Example_CN: 智能手机是有用的现代发明。

Example_EN: Parents invest time in reading with their children.
Example_CN: 父母投入时间陪孩子阅读。

Collocation: investigate a crime;investigate carefully;investigate the cause
Example_EN: Police will investigate the cause of the fire.
Example_CN: 警方将调查火灾原因。

Example_EN: The accident is still under investigation.
Example_CN: 事故仍在调查中。

Example_EN: Education is a long-term investment in the future.
Example_CN: 教育是对未来的长期投资。

Example_EN: The city hopes to attract foreign investors.
Example_CN: 这座城市希望吸引外国投资者。

Example_EN: Tiny scratches were almost invisible in the light.
Example_CN: 光线下细小划痕几乎看不见。

Collocation: party invitation;accept an invitation;send an invitation
Example_EN: Thank you for the party invitation next Saturday.
Example_CN: 谢谢你下周六聚会的邀请。

Example_EN: The project will involve three local schools.
Example_CN: 该项目将涉及三所本地学校。

Example_EN: Parents should get involved in school activities.
Example_CN: 家长应参与学校活动。

Example_EN: Please iron this shirt before the interview.
Example_CN: 面试前请熨这件衬衫。

Collocation: key issue;issue a statement;raise an issue
Example_EN: Traffic safety is a key issue for the town council.
Example_CN: 交通安全是镇议会的关键议题。

Collocation: news item;item on the list;personal item
Example_EN: Please check every item on your packing list.
Example_CN: 请核对打包清单上的每一项。

Example_EN: The thief spent six months in jail.
Example_CN: 小偷在监狱待了六个月。

Collocation: glass jar;jar of jam;open a jar
Example_EN: Please open this jar of jam for breakfast.
Example_CN: 请打开这罐果酱作早餐。

Example_EN: They listen to jazz music every Friday night.
Example_CN: 他们每周五晚听爵士乐。

Example_EN: Try not to feel jealous of other people's success.
Example_CN: 尽量不要嫉妒别人的成功。

Example_EN: A powerful jet of water cleaned the muddy path.
Example_CN: 一股强力水柱冲净了泥泞小路。

Example_EN: She keeps her gold jewellery in a locked box.
Example_CN: 她把金首饰锁在盒子里。

Example_EN: The book was a joint effort by two authors.
Example_CN: 这本书是两位作者共同完成的。

Example_EN: She keeps a journal of her daily thoughts.
Example_CN: 她写日记记录日常想法。

Collocation: newspaper journalist;investigative journalist;work as a journalist
Example_EN: He works as a newspaper journalist in Glasgow.
Example_CN: 他在格拉斯哥当报纸记者。

Collocation: feel joy;tears of joy;source of joy
Example_EN: Her children's laughter fills her with joy.
Example_CN: 孩子们的笑声让她充满喜悦。

Example_EN: Please do not judge others by first impressions alone.
Example_CN: 请不要仅凭第一印象评判他人。

Example_EN: Managers need good judgment under pressure.
Example_CN: 管理者在压力下需要良好判断力。

Example_EN: Junior staff receive training in the first month.
Example_CN: 初级员工第一个月接受培训。

Collocation: jury trial;members of the jury;jury decides
Example_EN: The jury listened carefully to every witness.
Example_CN: 陪审团认真听取每位证人。

Collocation: social justice;sense of justice;bring to justice
Example_EN: People want to see justice after the scandal.
Example_CN: 丑闻后人们希望看到公正。

Collocation: justify a decision;hard to justify;justify yourself
Example_EN: Can you justify spending so much on advertising?
Example_CN: 你如何证明花这么多广告费是合理的？

Example_EN: She is keen to learn more about British history.
Example_CN: 她渴望多了解英国历史。

Example_EN: The parcel weighs almost two kilogrammes.
Example_CN: 这个包裹几乎重两公斤。

Example_EN: Lions belong to the animal kingdom.
Example_CN: 狮子属于动物界。

Example_EN: Every car should carry a small first-aid kit.
Example_CN: 每辆车都应带一个小急救包。

Collocation: knock on the door;knock over;knock at
Example_EN: Please knock on the door before you enter.
Example_CN: 请先敲门再进屋。

Collocation: tie a knot;loose knot;knot in wood
Example_EN: Can you teach me how to tie a strong knot?
Example_CN: 你能教我如何打一个牢固绳结吗？

Example_EN: Teachers help students share knowledge with each other.
Example_CN: 老师帮助学生互相分享知识。

Collocation: science lab;lab work;work in a lab
Example_EN: We have science lab every Wednesday afternoon.
Example_CN: 我们每周三下午上科学实验课。

Example_EN: Always read the label before you take medicine.
Example_CN: 服药前一定阅读标签。

Example_EN: Scientists work late in the research laboratory.
Example_CN: 科学家在研究实验室工作到很晚。

Example_EN: Farm work often involves hard manual labour.
Example_CN: 农活常涉及繁重体力劳动。

Example_EN: Lack of sleep makes concentration more difficult.
Example_CN: 睡眠不足使注意力更难集中。

Example_EN: Please hold the ladder while I paint the ceiling.
Example_CN: 我刷天花板时请扶住梯子。

Example_EN: The young lady behind the desk helped us politely.
Example_CN: 柜台后那位小姐礼貌地帮助了我们。

Example_EN: Birds prefer to rest on dry land after long flights.
Example_CN: 长距离飞行后鸟类更喜欢在陆地上休息。

Example_EN: The mountain landscape attracts painters every summer.
Example_CN: 山景每年夏天吸引画家。

Example_EN: Stay in the left traffic lane until the next exit.
Example_CN: 保持在左侧车道直到下一个出口。

Example_EN: Students take notes on a laptop during lectures.
Example_CN: 学生上课用笔记本电脑记笔记。

Example_EN: The delay was largely because of heavy traffic.
Example_CN: 延误很大程度上因为交通拥堵。

Example_EN: Have you heard the latest news about the festival?
Example_CN: 你听说关于节日的最新消息了吗？
